About Our School

Seven decades of educational legacy

Our Story

Established in 1955, this school was formerly known as Mithila High English School. It is now recognised as +2 Government Mithila High School, Balaur, affiliated to BSEB, Patna.

A co-educational institution offering Classes 9 to 12. Our mission is to prepare every student with knowledge, discipline, and strong values.

Well Qualified & Experienced Teachers
Discipline & Quality Education
Student-Friendly Environment
Focus on Academic Excellence
Co-Education · Class 9 to 12

Admission 2026–27

Admissions open for Class 9th and 11th

📋 Class 11th Students: You must also apply on OFSS Bihar portal. Apply on OFSS Bihar →

📋 Admission Form

📄 Class 9th – Required Documents

  • 8th Class Pass SLC (Original)
  • Student's Aadhaar Card (Duplicate)
  • Parent / Guardian's Aadhaar Card
  • Bank Passbook Photocopy
  • Passport Size Photo – 2
  • Email ID & Mobile Number
  • Admission Form (Filled)
  • Caste Certificate

📄 Class 11th – Required Documents

  • 10th Marksheet (BSEB)
  • Transfer Certificate (TC)
  • Student & Parent's Aadhaar Card
  • Passport Size Photo – 2
  • Caste Certificate
  • Bank Passbook
  • OFSS Bihar Application Receipt
